data.description: 38-0 is a free English top-flight draft game and squad builder. Build an all-time XI from 4,000+ player seasons spanning 1992 to today, then simulate a full 38-game season and see how far your team can go.

How to play

  1. 1
    Spin the wheel
    Each spin lands on a real English top-flight club from a specific season.
  2. 2
    Draft a player
    Pick a player from that squad and slot them into your formation.
  3. 3
    Build your XI
    Repeat until all 11 positions are filled with English top-flight talent.
  4. 4
    Simulate the season
    Play out all 38 games and chase a perfect, unbeaten 38-0.

Popular challenges

  • ▸Go a full 38-game season unbeaten
  • ▸Chase a perfect 38-0-0
  • ▸Win the league title
  • ▸Build a modern-era XI (2016 onwards)
  • ▸Draft an all-time XI from every era
  • ▸Win it on Hard Mode with ratings hidden

As seen across football social media

38-0 started as a simple idea: what's the best English top-flight team you could ever build? And turned into one of football's most-shared games. From viral X threads to group-chat arguments, it's become the fastest way to settle a football debate: build your XI, simulate the season, share your result, and dare your mates to beat it.

And counting
10,939,126
Seasons Simulated
5.4M+
Players worldwide
46M+
Impressions on X
1992
Every season since

What is 38-0?

38-0 is a free football draft game and squad builder where you build an all-time English top-flight XI from more than 4,000 player seasons spanning every campaign from 1992-93 to today. You spin a wheel to land on a real club and season, draft one player from that squad, and fill your formation position by position. When your team is complete, you simulate a full 38-game season to see how far it goes, and whether it can do the impossible and win every match: 38-0.

Created by football fans, 38-0 has been shared by some of the biggest football accounts on X, drawing over 46 million impressions and more than 5.4 million players, all without a penny of marketing. It has become the go-to game for all-time XI debates, dream-team what-ifs, and settling once and for all whose squad is really the strongest.

Unlike fantasy football, 38-0 isn't tied to current players or live gameweeks. It's a nostalgia and history game: mix modern superstars with English top-flight legends from the 90s, 2000s and 2010s, drop a 2004 invincible next to a 2012 title winner, and find out how your cross-era XI would actually perform across a full season.

Frequently asked questions

What is 38-0?+

38-0 is an English top-flight draft game where you build an all-time XI from players across every era of English top-flight history. Once your team is complete, you simulate a full 38-game season to see how your squad performs.

How do you play 38-0?+

Spin the wheel to land on an English top-flight club and season, draft a player from that squad, and add them to your team. Repeat until your XI is complete, then simulate the season and see how many points your team can earn.

Which players and clubs are included?+

38-0 includes more than 4,000 player seasons from 49 English top-flight clubs, covering every season from 1992-93 to the present day. You can combine players from different eras to build your dream team.

Is 38-0 free to play?+

Yes. 38-0 is completely free and works in any modern web browser.

Is 38-0 a fantasy football game?+

No. Fantasy football games are based on current players and real-world gameweeks. 38-0 is a nostalgia game where you build an all-time team from any era and simulate an entire season instantly.

Is 38-0 affiliated with any league?+

No. 38-0 is an independent game created by football fans. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any football league, competition, club, or governing body. References to clubs, players, and historical seasons are used descriptively to power the game and do not imply any official association.

Where do the player ratings come from?+

38-0's player ratings are an independent interpretation based on publicly available data and are used for descriptive purposes only, they may differ from any official source. 38-0 is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any game, publisher, or ratings provider.

Why is it called 38-0?+

The aim of the game is to build a team capable of winning every match in an English top-flight season. Technically, a perfect season would be 38 wins, 0 draws, and 0 defeats, but the name 38-0 stuck and became part of the game's identity.

Explore 38-0

  • Football draft game →How the spin-and-draft format works.
  • All-time XI builder →Combine legends and modern stars into one team.
  • Greatest all-time XI →The XI every group chat falls out over.
  • Season simulator →What happens when you play out all 38 games.
  • How to play 38-0 →A step-by-step guide to your first run.

Can you build the ultimate English top-flight team?

Draft your XI, simulate the season, and see whether your team can achieve the impossible: 38 wins from 38 matches.

Play 38-0→

38-0 is an independent fan-made English top-flight football draft and season simulator. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, licensed by, or otherwise associated with any football club, competition, league, player association, governing body, organisation, game publisher, or ratings provider. All club names, player names, ratings, statistics and season data are used for informational, descriptive and editorial purposes only. No official logos, crests, player images, likenesses or other official branding are used. All trademarks, trade names and other intellectual property rights remain the property of their respective owners.

We use essential technologies to operate the website. With your permission, we also use analytics technologies to understand how the game is used and advertising technologies to support and measure advertisements. You can accept, reject or manage your preferences at any time.
